title: Bridge Essay: Biophilic classroom environments on stress and cognitive performance: A randomized crossover study in virtual reality (VR).
concept: Biophilia, nature connectedness, neurobiophilia, environmental neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — biophilia, nature connectedness, environmental neuroscience, neurobiophilia.
**Phase context:** Biophilia, nature connectedness, neurobiophilia, environmental neuroscience.

**Biophilic classroom environments on stress and cognitive performance: A randomized crossover study in virtual reality (VR).** — PLoS One (2023). DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0291355. PMID: 37910474. The emerging Metaverse will likely increase time expenditure in indoor virtual environments, which could impact human health and well-being. The biophilia hypothesis suggests that humans have an innate tendency to seek connections with the natural world and there is increasing evidence that biophilic design such as the incorporation of green plants can yield health benefits.
